stemHtml: When must a pilot announce wake turbulence category?

options.a: If MTOM exceeds 136,000 kg, on every initial call on a new frequency.
options.b: All aircraft must include it in congested airspace.
options.c: If actual TOM exceeds 7000 kg, on every new frequency.
options.d: Only on first contact with approach/departure/tower if heavy or super.
